name: STANDARDS-URLS registry rejects two entries that share the same id (uniqueness invariant)
setup:
printf '%b
' '- id: src-1
  name: X
  url: https://x.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: src-1
  name: Y
  url: https://y.com
  tier: 2
  applies_to: [node]
  fetch_frequency: weekly' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
